name: Diamond Lake Yacht Club
description: Diamond Lake Yacht Club is a place to play pickleball in Cassopolis, MI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, and youth programming.

name: Edwardsburg Sports Complex
description: Edwardsburg Sports Complex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Edwardsburg, MI. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. You can reserve the courts.

name: Penn Township Pickleball
description: Penn Township Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Vandalia, MI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and water. Reservations are available. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Search Penn Township Pickleball on Court Reserve
